about.intro: I am Furqan Ahmad Bhat from Baramulla, pursuing a Bachelor's in Data Science and Physics.
about.approach: I build real-world intelligent systems using AI, IoT, and data-driven approaches.
about.focus: My focus is on solving practical problems with scalable and efficient systems.

projects.title: Apple Grading System
projects.description: Built using CNN to classify apples based on color, size, and defects. Helps automate agricultural sorting and improves efficiency.

projects.title: Tiwzz
projects.description: Connects rural restaurants with nearby customers within a 10–15 km radius, helping small businesses grow.

projects.title: IoT Health Device
projects.description: Predicts patient needs using sensor data and alerts caregivers in advance, improving healthcare efficiency.
